prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次分别为约329名→272名→718名→721名→951名，整体呈持续后移趋势，尤其2023年起位次从272名大幅后移至718名，此后逐年扩大，近3年累计后移约679名；2025年基准位次约951名；该校在云南省理科（物理类）招生计划：2021–2022年6人，2023–2025年7人，2026年增至10人，较2025年扩招约42.9%，扩招幅度显著，有助于缓解竞争压力，对位次有向下拉动作用（位次数字增大）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 浙江大学医学院隶属浙江大学，985/211/双一流，软科中国大学排名主榜第3名（2026年），属全国顶尖高校层次，对高分考生有极强吸引力；2026年高考周期内浙江大学声誉评价为偏负面，涉及学术不端、师德师风及校园安全事件，可能对部分考生报考心理产生轻微抑制；抖音热度排名第14（高热），短视频曝光量大，整体关注度仍处高位。历史投档异常方面，2021–2025年均未见明显断档记录；浙江大学临床医学A、基础医学A-、药学A+、生物学A、口腔医学（依托临床医学）等学科实力顶尖，与招生专业（临床医学5+3一体化、口腔医学、医学试验班等）高度匹配，对医学类考生吸引力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学2024年评估为推荐（偏热），口腔医学评估为推荐（偏热），医学类专业整体热度持续高位；云南省2026年高考总人数377900人，按近年物理类占比约60.7%估算，物理类考生约22.9万人，较2025年物理类17.3万人增加约32%，竞争加剧；2026年；浙江大学医学院位于浙江省杭州市（非本省），对本省考生无地域保护；该校在云南省招生占比极小（约1–2%），跨省报考需较高位次。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年大幅扩招（42.9%）与云南省物理类考生显著增加（约32%）两大核心因素，扩招幅度略大于考生增幅，理论上位次应后移（更易进）；但浙江大学医学院作为全国顶尖医学学府，临床医学、口腔医学等专业社会热度持续高位，叠加抖音高热曝光，报考竞争不减。，考虑考生规模扩大与医学热度对冲扩招效应，预测2026年最低位次约1177名，区间1043–1311名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（5+3一体化）（学制5年）
- 口腔医学（学制5年）
- 医学试验班（竺可桢学院巴德年医学班）（8年制）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 医学试验班类（未来健康创新班）（含预防医学）
- 基础医学（智慧创新班）（学制5年）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 药学（含智能药学卓越班）
- 预防医学（历史招生专业，2026年并入医学试验班）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间1043–1311名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档王牌专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如1043名以内）可重点冲击临床医学（5+3一体化）和口腔医学等一档专业；位次接近区间上限（1311名附近）应以药学、基础医学等二/三档专业为主，确保录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 329 → 272 → 718 → 721 → 951, showing a continuous backward trend, especially from 2023 when the ranking significantly shifted from 272 to 718, and then expanded year by year, with a cumulative backward shift of about 679 positions in the last 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 951; the enrollment plan for this university in Yunnan province for science (physics category) was 6 students in 2021–2022, 7 students in 2023–2025, and increased to 10 students in 2026, an expansion of about 42.9% compared to 2025, which is significant and helps alleviate competition pressure, exerting a downward pull on rankings (ranking numbers increase).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhejiang University School of Medicine is affiliated with Zhejiang University, a 985/211/Double First-Class university, ranked 3rd in the main list of the Soft Science China University Rankings (2026), belonging to the top tier of national universities, strongly attracting high-scoring students; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Zhejiang University's reputation evaluation is slightly negative, involving academic misconduct, teacher ethics, and campus safety incidents, which may mildly suppress some students' application psychology; Douyin popularity ranking is 14th (high heat), with high short video exposure, overall attention remains high. In terms of historical admission anomalies, no obvious gaps were recorded from 2021 to 2025; Zhejiang University's clinical medicine (A), basic medicine (A-), pharmacy (A+), biology (A), and stomatology (relying on clinical medicine) are top-tier disciplines, highly matching the enrollment majors (clinical medicine 5+3 integration, stomatology, medical experimental class, etc.), strongly attracting medical students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Clinical medicine was assessed as recommended (slightly hot) in 2024, stomatology assessed as recommended (slightly hot), and medical majors overall remain at a high heat level; the total number of Yunnan province college entrance examination takers in 2026 is 377,900, with physics category accounting for about 60.7% in recent years, estimated at about 229,000 physics category students, an increase of about 32% compared to 173,000 in 2025, intensifying competition; 2026; Zhejiang University School of Medicine is located in Hangzhou, Zhejiang Province (not in the province), with no regional protection for local students; the university's enrollment proportion in Yunnan is very small (about 1–2%), requiring higher rankings for cross-province applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the two core factors of significant expansion in 2026 (42.9%) and a notable increase in Yunnan physics category students (about 32%), the expansion rate slightly exceeds the student growth rate, theoretically causing rankings to shift backward (easier to enter); however, as a top national medical school, Zhejiang University School of Medicine's clinical medicine, stomatology, and other majors maintain high social heat, coupled with high Douyin exposure, application competition remains strong. Taking into account the expansion of the student pool and the medical heat offsetting the expansion effect, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 1177, with a range of 1043–1311.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integration) (5-year program)
- Stomatology (5-year program)
- Medical Experimental Class (Chu Kochen Honors College Ba De Nian Medical Class) (8-year program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Medical Experimental Class (Future Health Innovation Class) (including Preventive Medicine)
- Basic Medicine (Wisdom Innovation Class) (5-year program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Pharmacy (including Intelligent Pharmacy Excellence Class)
- Preventive Medicine (historical enrollment major, merged into Medical Experimental Class in 2026).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 1043–1311, it is recommended to mainly apply for Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 1043), focus on impacting Tier 1 majors such as Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integration) and Stomatology; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 1311), mainly apply for Tier 2/3 majors such as Pharmacy and Basic Medicine to ensure admission.
